case_title: SAMMY BANQUERIGO VS. GREYSTAR MANAGEMENT SERVICES, LP, ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-17-2021 CONTINUED TO APR-07-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BANQUERIGO, SAMMY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-18-2021 CONTINUED TO JUL-13-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100130953)

WRONGFUL DISCHARGE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANQUERIGO, SAMMY AS TO DEFENDANT GREYSTAR MANAGEMENT SERVICES, LP, A DELAWARE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-17-2021 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-16-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-25-2021

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-18-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-07-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100128815), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANQUERIGO, SAMMY SERVED MAR-24-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GREYSTAR MANAGEMENT SERVICES, LP, A DELAWARE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-13-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
